top_story.title: Stock Market Today: Nasdaq Shows Its Strength; Nvidia, Palantir Make These Moves (Live Coverage)
top_story.summary: The Dow Jones Industrial Average and other major stock indexes finished Tuesday's session with healthy gains as investors seemed pleased by a lower inflation reading.  Meanwhile, Nvidia saw more positive momentum as Alphabet hit an early buy point on the stock market today.  The Dow closed with a 0.7% gain, or nearly 318 points.
